content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed materialize_beads export logic, BrMutationAdapter additions (dep_add_with_kind, label comma validation), BeadDetail deserialize for both object/single-array br output, PendingBeadExportAttempt locking, and idempotency paths. Verified cargo check / fmt / clippy (lib) / the 16 materialize_beads_* tests pass. The one failing lib test (resume_running_failed_project_reenters_failure_reconciliation) pre-exists on master and is unrelated. cargo clippy --all-targets has 27 errors but all pre-exist on master in test code. Verified the real br CLI supports --labels=a,b,c (even with colons) and dep add --type=parent-child. Idempotency is well-covered by tests including closed/deferred history, duplicate workstream names, explicit-id label matching, and multi-milestone separation. Concurrent export is guarded by flock + pid liveness; failure mid-export is recoverable via title/label reuse. Bundle validation correctly rejects reserved labels and labels containing ','. No correctness, safety, or robustness bugs found that warrant amendments.

## Amendments

None.
